title: LICENSE is incomplete: missing copyright owner
body:
The license for this project is incomplete, the copyright notice is missing a year and copyright holder:

https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/8d0d8f9f64c1e2659323ebd97bf2abe382dad6bb/LICENSE#L189

Also, the ASF advises using a short form linking to the full copy of the license and filling out the copyright notice. Read more here: https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0#apply

comments.body:
https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/18646#discussioncomment-5972010

Per our prior legal guidance this is not recommended.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Closing, per [prior legal guidance](https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/18646#discussioncomment-5972010) leaving the appendix template unfilled is intentional and the recommended approach.
